briefdescription.para: allow message pool access to private members

detaileddescription.para: The function release the message to the pool from which it was allocated by calling the method free of the originating pool.

briefdescription.para: Getter function to retrieve the pointer to message buffer content.

detaileddescription.para:
returns the pointer to the message buffer content
The function return the pointer to message buffer content in private member variable buf.

briefdescription.para: Getter function to retrieve the buffer size.

detaileddescription.para:
returns the size of message buffer
The function return the buffer size in private member variable bufLen.

briefdescription.para: Function to clear the buffer content.

detaileddescription.para: The function clear the buffer content by setting a value of 0 for all bytes of the buffer and set private member varaible dataLen to 0.

briefdescription.para: Function to copy a string in the buffer content.

detaileddescription.para:
s
The string to put in the buffer content
The function copy a string in the buffer content and assign the string length to member variable dataLen.

briefdescription.para: Function to copy data in the buffer content.

detaileddescription.para:
pdata
A pointer to the data to put in the buffer content
len
Length of the data
The function copy data in the buffer content and assign the length of the data to member variable dataLen.

memberdef.argsstring: (msgType type, uint8_t sender, uint8_t para1=0, int8_t para2=0)
memberdef.name: PoolElem

detaileddescription.para:
type
The message type of enumerator type msgType
sender
The sender ID
para1
8-bit unsigned int parameter, default value is 0
para2
8-bit unsigned int parameter, default value is 0
The constructor initializes member variables mtype, from, p1 and p2.
The destructor is never called and is implemented only for completion reasons. It simply triggers a debug message on info debug level.
The function print out statistics of the pool element
The function print out the buffer content as string
The function print out the buffer content as hexadecimal values

briefdescription.para: The pool element class that provides the messages to be send or received.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para: A pool element is a messages which will be send to or received from tasks. A pool element is allways allocated from an existing message pool of type MsgPool. The private variable pool held the pointer to the originating pool. The pool element class provides methods for setting and getting the content of the message and for freeing itself, furthermore getter functions to retrieve the pointer to the message content and the buffer size and methods to clear the buffer content and to put data into the buffer.
